svg.text: India → USA pharmaceutical shipment — all failure points

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What agents handle the India warehouse to airport leg?')
sendPrompt('What happens during the truck leg from warehouse to airport?')
sendPrompt('What checks happen at the origin airport in India?')
sendPrompt('What are the risks at a transit hub like Dubai or Frankfurt?')
sendPrompt('What checks happen at the US airport and customs?')
sendPrompt('What happens on the last mile delivery from airport to hospital?')
sendPrompt('What happens at the destination hospital receiving dock?')
sendPrompt('How does the system detect a stationary truck and decide if it is a breakdown?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the cold storage unit on the truck fails mid-route?')
sendPrompt('What if the IoT sensor itself fails or loses signal mid-shipment?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent handle a flight cancellation versus a flight delay?')
sendPrompt('What are the risks when cargo is held at a transit hub like Dubai?')
sendPrompt('What happens if FDA import documentation is rejected at US customs?')
sendPrompt('How does the system handle a container door breach detected mid-flight?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the destination hospital is at capacity and cannot receive?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the battery on the IoT tracker dies mid-shipment?')
sendPrompt('Show me the full decision tree when an anomaly is detected')
g.text: All scenarios funnel here → human approval → cascade
